frontmatter.description: Homelab, React95, Windows 95 fonts, fun is the key. I realized all of it is the same impulse of making the internet my way, with my own face on it, without depending on whoever already decided what it should look like.
frontmatter.title: Why I do things my own way on the internet
Why I do things my own way on the internet
